text.title: voice-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for voice-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using fixed-duration recording (sd.rec with a hardcoded duration).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Truncates long speech; records silence for short utterances. Always use VAD-based recording in production.

failure-mode.description: Awaiting tool calls synchronously in the voice loop without a "thinking" response.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Long-running tool calls stall TTS - the user hears silence for several seconds with no feedback.

failure-mode.description: Implementing interrupt detection only as an afterthought.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If new audio is detected during TTS playback and the agent does not stop playback immediately, the user hears overlapping speech - a blocking UX failure.
